articles.title: Antonelli admits ‘overdriving the car’ in Barcelona
articles.summary: Kimi Antonelli has shared his reflections after Qualifying at the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix, with the Mercedes driver having to settle for P3.

articles.title: ‘We have a race’ – Hamilton after strong P2 in Barcelona
articles.summary: Lewis Hamilton believes "we’re in a good position to be able to fight" for victory in the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix, with the Ferrari driver set to start on the front row.

articles.title: ‘I feel like my old self again’ – Russell on Barcelona pole
articles.summary: George Russell made a return to the top spot with Mercedes after delivering a spectacular lap in Qualifying for the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix.

articles.title: Leclerc 'very ashamed' after Barcelona Qualifying crash
articles.summary: Charles Leclerc admits "feeling very ashamed" after crashing in Qualifying for the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix, adding that there was "no excuses" for the incident.

articles.title: Russell storms to pole in Barcelona as Leclerc crashes out
articles.summary: Mercedes' George Russell bounced back in style by claiming pole ahead of Ferrari's Lewis Hamilton and championship leader Kimi Antonelli.

articles.title: Maini takes impressive victory in F2 Barcelona Sprint Race
articles.summary: Kush Maini took a commanding win in the FIA Formula 2 Sprint Race in Barcelona, launching off the front row to pass polesitter Noel Leon and dominating from there.

articles.title: Betting mistakes to try and avoid in Barcelona
articles.summary: Safer gambling is important, so we look at how you can avoid losing money during Sunday’s race in Spain.

articles.title: AS IT HAPPENED: Russell claims Barcelona-Catalunya GP pole
articles.summary: Live coverage of Saturday's Formula 1 Qualifying session for the 2026 Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix in Spain.

articles.title: Hakkinen reveals what Russell needs to do to beat Antonelli

articles.title: Russell goes fastest in Barcelona FP3
articles.summary: George Russell set the fastest time in Free Practice 3 ahead of the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix, the Mercedes driver leading McLaren's Oscar Piastri and Ferrari's Charles Leclerc.

articles.title: GP Barcelona F1, Charles Leclerc: “Sinto muita vergonha”

articles.title: F1, Toto Wolff assume preocupação com Lewis Hamilton: “Se for para a frente será difícil para todos”

articles.title: GP Barcelona F1: Lewis Hamilton surpreende com o 2º lugar: “boa posição para lutar amanhã”

articles.title: GP Barcelona de F1, Kimi Antonelli: “Não tenho tido uma boa sensação com o carro”
articles.summary: Andrea Kimi Antonelli garantiu a terceira posição na grelha de partida para o Grande Prémio de Barcelona-Catalunya. O piloto da Mercedes conseguiu limitar os estragos na Q3, apesar de ter ficado a três décimos de segundo
